history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young East Asian man with dark, styled hair is sitting on a textured gray floor, leaning against a light brown woven cushion. He is wearing a dark blue Adidas track jacket with white three-stripe detailing on the sleeves and a white logo on the chest, partially zipped up, obscuring his face as he looks down at his phone. His white pants have a ripped detail near the knee. The background features a modern retail display with shelves holding folded clothing items in shades of burgundy, brown, and black, and a lower shelf with several pairs of women's high heels. To the right, a wooden surface holds a stack of books, one of which is white and open, displaying a graphic design. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a casual and relaxed atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by blues, grays, whites, and browns, with pops of color from the clothing on the shelves. The overall mood is contemporary and laid-back, suggesting a moment of pause in a stylish boutique or showroom.
